title: Approvals & Feedback App

posts.author: steve.evans (Steve Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I have added the Approvals & Feedback app to my Change Request Form board. It all works great, but I am looking to see if I can add the URL to the approval page, to an automated email. When I add the auto populate field to the email template, for the link column, the link does not populate. Is there a way I can do this?
